title: Tanker Report August 8 2023 Slzrn
summary:
Main
• A rather dull market for VLCCs, as spot rates gradually soften - Summer traditionally has been a slow period for tanker shipping and this year so far proves to be no different. Spot voyage rates remain relatively unchanged, but higher bunker prices are placing some pressure on earnings with oil prices reaching multi-month highs. The Atlantic market, which has been a pilar of strength in the last few years, remain relatively strong vs the Middle East market where the recent production cuts by Saudi Arabia have reduced demand for spot vessels by a decent amount.
